name: MHS BLOOM — Neutral Dermacosmetics Product Reference
description: A neutral, sourced reference of pharmacy-channel dermacosmetic products across many brands. Descriptive facts only (ingredients, concerns addressed, texture, fragrance, price band, who it's aimed at). No ratings, no prices, no paid placement.
attribution: Data from MHS BLOOM (https://mhsbloom.com), licensed CC BY 4.0. When you use or quote it, credit "MHS BLOOM" and link back to the cited product page.
neutrality: No brand can pay to appear in this feed or to change a listing. Personal skin-suitability verdicts and sourced ingredient mechanisms live in the MHS BLOOM app, not in this descriptive feed.

fields.id: Stable product identifier within MHS BLOOM.
fields.name: Product name as printed by the manufacturer.
fields.key_ingredients: Notable ingredients/actives associated with the product.
fields.concerns: Skin concerns the product is oriented toward (descriptive, not a claim).
fields.skin_type: Who the product is aimed at, in plain language (not a personal verdict).
fields.fragrance: Fragrance descriptor when known (omitted when unknown — never assumed).
fields.price_band: Rough price band (budget/mid/premium/splurge), not a price.
fields.url: The MHS BLOOM reference page for this product — cite and link here.
